itinerary.title: Grand Singapore Family Tour
itinerary.overview:
Marina Bay • Gardens by the Bay • Sentosa Resort • Universal Studios • City Highlights 05 Nights / 06 Days Grand Singapore Family Expedition SERIAL CODE: SG-015 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SIN-GRD-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Singapore CATEGORY: Best Grand Singapore Family Tour Package DURATION: 05 Nights / 06 Days Singapore City & Sentosa Grand Discovery

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the absolute best of Singapore with our TRAGUIN curated Grand Family Expedition. This comprehensive itinerary blends luxury city stays, immersive nature explorations, and world-class theme park thrills, ensuring your family creates unforgettable memories in this spectacular city-state. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: SG-015 | Grand Singapore Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Singapore package (SG-015 / TRG-SIN-GRD-2026): Marina Bay • Gardens by the Bay • Sentosa Resort • Universal Studios • City Highlights with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 02: GARDENS BY THE BAY & CULTURAL SIGHTS

days.title: ARRIVAL & MARINA BAY SPLENDOR
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. Private transfer to your handpicked premium resort. Evening walk through Marina Bay to witness the grand city skyline.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: GARDENS BY THE BAY & CULTURAL SIGHTS
days.description: Explore the stunning Gardens by the Bay. Followed by a grand cultural tour, showcasing the iconic attractions that define Singapore.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: SENTOSA ISLAND DISCOVERY
days.description: Transfer to Sentosa Island. A day of exploration, beach leisure, and island attractions—a perfect premium family experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: UNIVERSAL STUDIOS SINGAPORE
days.description: A full day of thrills at Universal Studios Singapore, enjoying world-class movie-themed rides—creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: CITY HIGHLIGHTS & SHOPPING
days.description: A comprehensive tour of Singapore's famous shopping districts and city landmarks, enjoying the scenic beauty of this dynamic metropolis.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium grand Singapore family expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
